Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories Set One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SET ONE AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS BY DEFENDANTS ERIC-SCOTT TECHENG, M.D., JENNIFER STONE, M.D. AND DAWA SHERPA, M.D.

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: motion to compel responses to set one form interrogatories from plaintiff Julian Perez and for monetary sanctions is granted. Good cause shown and no opposition filed. No later than April 10, 2026 Perez must serve verified code-compliant responses without objections to the set one form interrogatories and pay $500 total (not to each) in reasonable monetary sanctions to Tcheng, Stone, and Sherpa. Proposed order submitted. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)
